metadata.name: Sanitized
metadata.description: Check your app’s health and discover app or platform issues.

rows: Avg private bytes of memory usage
🚀 Try Out Our New Windows Web App Diagnoser (Preview)

We are excited to introduce a new diagnostic tool, Windows Web App Diagnoser 🛠️, now available for you to try! 📥 To download, simply run the following command in your terminal or PowerShell: `curl -L -o WindowsWebAppDiagnoser.exe https://github.com/puneetg1983/WindowsWebAppDiagnoser/releases/latest/download/WindowsWebAppDiagnoser.exe` Once downloaded, you can run it against your web app by specifying: `WindowsWebAppDiagnoser.exe -r /subscriptions/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/resourceGroups/Sanitized/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/Sanitized-webapp` 📝 This tool is currently in Preview and is best suited for .NET applications. We are actively improving it and would love your feedback as we refine its capabilities. This tool operates in an agentic manner, following a carefully designed workflow to investigate and diagnose issues in your Windows web apps. 🔗 Learn more and follow updates here: Windows Web App Diagnoser
